---
title: "v9b_songunet_bridge"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

## Description

Diffusion-bridge candidate using the same SongUNet backbone, but starting from a noisy CNO field instead of pure noise.

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Architecture | SongUNetPosEmbd / NCSN++ style U-Net |
| Objective | stochastic bridge from noisy `mu` to HR |
| Start state | `mu + sigma(mu) * eps` |
| Target | HR direct |
| Patch size | 256 |
| Motivation | keep the trajectory physically close to the deterministic CNO state |
| Research inspiration | diffusion bridges, stochastic interpolants, AFM-style adaptive noise |

## Variables

::: {.panel-tabset}
### thetao
::: {.figure-grid}
::: {.figure-slot}
#### HR / CNO / CNO+FM
`assets/figures/v9b_songunet_bridge/thetao/presentation.png`
:::
::: {.figure-slot}
#### HR-LR / CNO Residual / FM Residual
`assets/figures/v9b_songunet_bridge/thetao/residuals.png`
:::
::: {.figure-slot}
#### CNO Error / FM Error
`assets/figures/v9b_songunet_bridge/thetao/errors.png`
:::
:::
### so
`assets/figures/v9b_songunet_bridge/so/`
### zos
`assets/figures/v9b_songunet_bridge/zos/`
### uo
`assets/figures/v9b_songunet_bridge/uo/`
### vo
`assets/figures/v9b_songunet_bridge/vo/`
:::

## Metrics

`assets/metrics/v9b_songunet_bridge.csv`
